codeReview.summary: The fix closes the prior timer page-family scrutiny gap by replacing proxy assertions with view-local evidence in all three subviews. List and timesheet now have dedicated containers, VAL-TIMER-002 proves seeded facts within list and timesheet content, and VAL-TIMER-004 proves the pre-existing running timer through subview-local list/timesheet rendering instead of only shared header state.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, worker transcript skeleton, handoff, skill instructions, commit 1205124 diff, and the resulting timer page files. The implementation satisfies the milestone contract for tightening VAL-TIMER-002 and VAL-TIMER-004 with unmistakable view-local evidence across calendar, list, and timesheet, and I found no remaining blocking or non-blocking issues for this feature.
